positive: A symmetrical, central mandala pattern depicting bioluminescent cosmic flora and geometric celestial vines. The style is highly detailed, ornate linework combined with digital gouache painting, evoking Art Deco meets sacred geometry. The primary color palette features deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, glowing ethereal aqua, and rich metallic gold accents. The composition must feature bold, clean silhouettes and strong contrast, suitable for a single-color screen print on apparel. Lighting is dramatic and luminescent, emphasizing glowing energy trails and crystalline structures. Ultra-minimalist complexity, perfect for tiling or large graphic print.
